3264460.name: Battle Bots
3264460.description: A compilation of 6 Halloween themed minigames. Skeleton Island: Survive an island of skeletons with bear traps and light. Trick or Treat: Wander a neighborhood for candy. Ninja Night: Platforming and combat against monsters, collecting scrolls and facing a couple bosses. Broom Flight: Fly around on a pumpkin pop instead of a broom as a witch. Race another witch to the end of a level. Then, interact with rings. Concoction: In first person, pick up and move around magical objects to achieve odd results. Point and Haunt: Control a ghost who interacts with objects in a room to increase a fear meter.
